title: SorobanCredentialsType
description:
SorobanCredentialsType is an XDR Enum defined as:

```text enum SorobanCredentialsType { SOROBAN_CREDENTIALS_SOURCE_ACCOUNT = 0, SOROBAN_CREDENTIALS_ADDRESS = 1 #ifdef CAP_0071 , SOROBAN_CREDENTIALS_ADDRESS_V2 = 2, SOROBAN_CREDENTIALS_ADDRESS_WITH_DELEGATES = 3 #endif }; ```
